message:
test(doom/bsp): add 21 tests for BSP traversal and bbox visibility (bd-17s5d)

Cover: bbox edge cases (corner, behind viewer, wide/narrow FOV, angle wrapping,
zero-size, degenerate), deep BSP trees (3- and 4-subsector balanced), horizontal/
diagonal/offset partition lines, viewer on partition line, early exit on 2nd
subsector, deterministic traversal, opposite-side reversal, no-nodes degenerate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
